section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# Periodic Transaction Report — cover page

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **Filer status:** [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank)
- **Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** Yes [ ] / No [X]
- **Initial report or amended report:** [X] Initial Report, [ ] Amendment. Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

Stamps/annotations: "HAND DELIVERED"; "Name: Rohit Khanna  Page 1 of 3"; "LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER 17 SEP 19 AM 9:27 OFFICE OF THE CLERK U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES"; handwritten initials "MC" above "(For Official Use Only)".

Transaction grid: only the greyed example row (JT, Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock, Sale X, 02/05/015, 03/07/15, amount B $15,001-$50,000) is present; first data row reads "Please see the attached"; remaining rows blank.
